title: celmisia discolor var. discolor
intro: Celmisia discolor var. discolor, commonly known as the Alpine Daisy or Mountain Daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the southern regions of South Island in New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Celmisia discolor var. discolor include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from fever and cold symptoms. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
